name: Chocolate Banana-Split Pie
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Chocolate nonfat ice milk or Frozen nonfat yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the graham cracker crumbs and 2 tablespoons of chocolate syrup. Using a fork, mix well. Using the back side of a spoon, press the crumb mixture over the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie plate; set aside.
2. Using an electric mixer on medium speed (or food processor), beat the frozen ice milk or yogurt until smooth. Using a spatula, carefully spread over the crust. Cover with plastic wrap and freeze until firm about 2 hours.
3. To serve, slice bananas and arrange in a circle over the ice milk/yogurt. Spread cool whip over bananas and drizzle with remaining chocolate syrup.
VARIATION: Substitute 2 cups fresh strawberries for the bananas
